evals.prompt: Use the Matt Partok plugin to turn my rough board memo idea into a multi-thread plan. I am not ready to write yet.
evals.expected_output: Routes the foggy multi-thread effort to matt-wayfinder, then returns to a spec and bounded tickets after the map clears, without drafting prematurely.
expectations: Selects matt-wayfinder and begins with the destination and decision frontier
Does not execute or publish before decisions are resolved
Explains the handoff point for fresh threads

evals.prompt: Run Matt's flow for this small code change. It fits in one session and I want test-first implementation plus a final review.
evals.expected_output: Routes directly from clarification to matt-implement, uses matt-tdd, and closes with matt-code-review.
expectations: Avoids unnecessary spec and ticket ceremony for a one-session change
Does not promise an automatic commit

evals.prompt: Use Matt Wayfinder for a research-heavy strategy project whose major decisions are still foggy.
evals.expected_output: Creates a planning-only decision map with destination, frontier, fog, and durable handoffs before delivery work.
expectations: Separates decision tickets from deliverable tickets
Uses local durable state unless external tracker writes are authorized
Returns to matt-to-spec after the map clears
